raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.5": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 2,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The review identifies a key conceptual issue (conflicting contributions) and proposes a reframing solution. However, it doesn't fully explore the implications of each framing on the evidence required.",
    "R1.5": "The review suggests several structural improvements but doesn't provide a complete end-to-end section plan with rationale for each section.",
    "RX.1": "The review flags uncertainty about the generalizability of the findings and the strength of certain claims, but it doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The review highlights a drift from the requested scope by focusing too heavily on the authors' own benchmark and not considering external benchmarks.",
    "RX.4": "The review identifies no regressions in terms of harmful content or factual accuracy.",
    "RX.5": "The review doesn't mention any specific source tracing or annotation for changes made to the text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.5": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The review identifies a key conceptual issue (conflicting contributions) and proposes a reframing solution. However, it doesn't fully explore the implications of each framing on the evidence required.
rationale.R1.5: The review suggests several structural improvements but doesn't provide a complete end-to-end section plan with rationale for each section.
rationale.RX.1: The review flags uncertainty about the generalizability of the findings and the strength of certain claims, but it doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The review highlights a drift from the requested scope by focusing too heavily on the authors' own benchmark and not considering external benchmarks.
rationale.RX.4: The review identifies no regressions in terms of harmful content or factual accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: The review doesn't mention any specific source tracing or annotation for changes made to the text.
